item.title: Gov. Lee blocks Lawmaker Jones from duty - Racism
item.dc:creator: AnonymousMockingjay

item.title: It wasn't with flying colors but i did it
item.description: Panic disorder for 27 years now. Every time i had a panic attack, my world became smaller. The last time I went outside at al was 22 years ago. It's like you're in prison, but the door is wide open. For the past 10 months I been in heavy therapy with a psychiatrist, psychologists, social workers, animal assisted coaching, the whole lot. It is starting to pay of.
item.dc:creator: Spuddywuddy

item.title: No
item.description: Most viral edit: Thanks for the award and upvotes, my dudes! Added the link for the Bluesky post and fixed a couple of errors. https://bsky.app/profile/ign.com/post/3lv2qrxv5nt2x Original post: I accidentally posted a meme today that was AI generated, I wasn’t paying close attention. It’s getting harder (at least for someone like me with bad eyes and ADHD) to tell the difference, and I hate it.

item.title: Last call - Deadline to sign the Stop Destroying Games initiative is tomorrow (31st)
item.description: Stop Destroying Games, the European Citizens' Initiative (ECI) against planned obsolescence tactics used to disable video games, closes on the 31st. It collected over 1.4 million signatures, and if you are a European citizen, you can still add your own. https://eci.ec.europa.eu/045/public/#/screen/home Please note that an ECI is not a simple petition, it is an official EU process to get a specific issue to the attention of the European Commission, as described here https://citizens-initiative.europa.eu/how-it-works_en This is one of less than 10 such initiatives that were ever able to cross the minimum threshold. After it closes, the next steps will be a presentation to the European Commission representatives, followed by discussions with all involved parties, including industry experts, game developers, publishers, etc.
item.dc:creator: The11thPlague

item.title: Let's get weird, y'all
item.dc:creator: RexNihil

item.title: Blackstone CEO was LUIGI’D!
item.description:
Blackstone Real Estate Income Trust CEO, Wesley LePatner killed in NYC office shooting. Blackstone is one of the corporations behind the mass purchasing of affordable housing, and increasing the prices of these homes exponentially. Blackstone is a large part of the horrendously inflated housing costs and shortages in America. In short, LePanter was the reason we could not afford to buy a house.
The shooter, Shane Tamura, appears to be having his motives obscured by corporate media. They’re focusing on his history as a football player, and the fact that the NFL’s offices are housed in the same building. But Tamura’s clear destination was the 33rd floor, which housed the offices of Blackstone, and LePatner. The NFL offices are not on that floor. https://www.aljazeera.com/amp/news/2025/7/29/nyc-shooting-what-we-know-about-the-victims-suspect-shane-tamura
item.dc:creator: haIucid

item.title: Advertising scam account Rexam95 at it again!
item.description:
Rexam95's new post https://imgur.com/gallery/random-video-dump-SvQrNiN is just a clone of DaveshShingari's https://imgur.com/gallery/random-video-dump-random-people-around-world-whn4yes with ads in it.
I'm just gonna keep calling out scam accounts now till they ban my 14 year old account permanently.
item.dc:creator: ModsSometimesHeedMyScamWarnings

item.title: Take care of one another
item.description: To remember our shared humanity is to resist the slide into tyranny. "The Golden Rule" is not just an idea. It's a daily commitment to justice, empathy, and truth. Because in the end, the dehumanization of others is the beginning of the dehumanization of us all. Sauce: https://www.elephantjournal.com/2025/07/the-dangerous-game-of-dehumanization-how-treating-others-as-less-than-human-threatens-us-all-freyja-inanna/
item.dc:creator: Johje19
